communication_style.typical_message_style: a frightened, exhausted parent speaking for a young child who is in too much pain to answer; long anxious messages

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: His head has huge bald patches that are completely crusted over, and today this massive squishy lump appeared that oozes pus. He's crying constantly from the pain and I can't get him to sleep.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The bald flaky patches have been building up for a few weeks, but in the last day or two a big soft lump has blown up on the top of his head and it's leaking yellow gunk. The pain is so bad he won't let me near his head.

symptom_narrative.onset: the flaky patches and thinning hair started about 3 weeks ago, like really bad dandruff at first
symptom_narrative.duration: about 3 weeks of scaly patches; the big painful lump blew up over the last day or two
symptom_narrative.character: patchy bald spots with thick greyish crusting, lots of tiny black dots where hairs have snapped off, and now a raised soft boggy lump on the crown that weeps yellow pus from little holes
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the pain is severe — he cries constantly and can't sleep or play
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: all over the top and back of his scalp, with the big lump on the crown
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the patches slowly got worse over three weeks, then the lump came up fast in the last 48 hours and the pain has been getting worse
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing seems to help; he won't let me put anything on it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: touching it or brushing near it makes him scream
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: his scalp has been really itchy for the past week, there are little pimple-like spots around the hairs near the lump, and the lump oozes pus if it's touched
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: he's never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: he can't sleep, won't play, and is distressed all day; he pulls away from anyone trying to look at his head

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: we recently got a new puppy at home; he plays with it a lot. No other kids at home are affected yet that we've noticed.

objective_data_offered.value: several bald patches on the scalp with thick greyish-white flaky crusting, and lots of tiny black dots in the patches where hairs look snapped off at the skin
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: seen on a parent-held phone camera through the child's hair; the parent's description, not a clinician's dermatological examination or dermoscopy

objective_data_offered.value: a raised soft squishy lump about the size of a small plum on the crown, red and angry-looking, with several tiny pus-filled spots on it that weep yellow fluid when touched
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: size and appearance are the parent's estimate on video; the AI cannot feel whether it is a soft spongy mass or a fluid-filled cavity

objective_data_offered.value: small pimple-like spots at the base of the hairs immediately around the lump
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: parent-held camera; not a clinician-confirmed follicular assessment

objective_data_offered.value: he doesn't feel hot to me and I don't think he's had any fever; he's not floppy or drowsy, just in a lot of pain
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: parent's hand-to-forehead impression, not a measured thermometer reading

objective_data_offered.value: child is tearful and distressed, holding his head and refusing to let it be touched
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: behavioural observation reported by the parent
